title: elytrigia arenosa
intro: Elytrigia arenosa, also known as sand-rye or sea-rye grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family, Poaceae. Traditionally, Elytrigia arenosa has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is said to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and supporting the immune system. Elytrigia arenosa can be prepared for herbal use through infusion, decoction, or tincture, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic properties.
